name: @vncsleal/quillby
description: Quillby — AI copywriting assistant. Reads the internet and writes content in your voice.
author: Vinicius Leal

scripts.build:binaries: bun build --compile --target=bun-darwin-arm64 ./src/mcp/server.ts --outfile quillby-mcp-macos-arm64 && bun build --compile --target=bun-darwin-x64 ./src/mcp/server.ts --outfile quillby-mcp-macos-x64 && bun build --compile --target=bun-linux-x64 ./src/mcp/server.ts --outfile quillby-mcp-linux-x64 && bun build --compile --target=bun-windows-x64 ./src/mcp/server.ts --outfile quillby-mcp-windows-x64.exe
scripts.test:integration: npm run build && vitest run tests/integration
